titles.title: BLESSED BE THE NAME OF MY ROCK

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Blessed be the Name of my Rock, Who trains my hands for war, Who causes me to walk In his overcoming power for evermore. Blessed be the Name of my Rock, Blessed be the Name of my Shield, Blessed be the Lamb Who has opened the scroll, And loosed the seven seals.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Proclaim this Word to every land, Let my people prepare for war. Wake up the mighty men, Let all the men become, Mighty men of war. Come be a people great and strong, The like of which has never been. Pick up your Sword, Pick up your Shield, And become mighty men.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let the weak say “I am strong”, Let the faint say “I am renewed”. Blow the trumpet in Zion, For I am coming soon.
